creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254653
graphics/py-pixelmatch.patch

py-pixelmatch offers a fast pixel-level image comparison tool, originally
designed for screenshot testing. It supports both raw image data and PIL.
Image instances, featuring advanced capabilities like anti-aliased pixel
detection and perceptual color difference metrics. Ideal for automated
visual regression testing, it enhances accuracy in image comparisons.

WWW: https://github.com/whtsky/pixelmatch-py

I will attach poudriere testport logs for 14.1-R and 13.4-R soon.

Thanks in advance.
